mission.title: temporal: Add health check handler for worker service
mission.description: Add health check handler for worker service. Requested by 18+ users.

steps.title: Check current temporal deployment
steps.description:
Verify your temporal version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n temporal -l app.kubernetes.io/name=temporal
helm list -n temporal 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working temporal installation.

steps.title: Review temporal configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant temporal configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n temporal -l app.kubernetes.io/name=temporal
kubectl get configmap -n temporal -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=temporal
```
Looks as currently worker service https://github.com/temporalio/temporal/tree/master/service/worker
does not expose a gRPC handler and the health check method like matching and history services do. 

Please add this if possible.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Add health check handler for worker service
steps.description:
- Add `server`, `grpcListener`, `healthServer` fields to worker Service struct
- Register health server in `Start()` with `SERVING` status
- Set `NOT_SERVING` status and gracefully stop in `Stop()`
- Add `ServerProvider` in fx.go for dependency injection
- Add unit test for health check
```yaml
livenessProbe:
  exec:
    command:
      - /bin/sh
      - -c
      - pidof your-worker-binary >/dev/null
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n temporal -l app.kubernetes.io/name=temporal
kubectl get events -n temporal --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Add health check handler for worker service" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
- Add `server`, `grpcListener`, `healthServer` fields to worker Service struct
- Register health server in `Start()` with `SERVING` status
- Set `NOT_SERVING` status and gracefully stop in `Stop()`
- Add `ServerProvider` in fx.go for dependency injection
- Add unit test for health check functionality

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with temporal installed or the issue environment reproducible.
